title: cert-manager-webhook-infoblox
description: Helm chart values for the cert-manager ACME DNS01 webhook backed by Infoblox WAPI.

groupName.description: Unique group name identifying this webhook (e.g. acme.mycompany.com). Must match the group name referenced in each Issuer's webhook stanza.

credentialsSecret.description: Kubernetes Secret that holds the Infoblox credentials.

name.description: Name of the Secret in the same namespace as the webhook.

rootCACertificate.description: Settings for the self-signed root CA certificate.

duration.description: Validity duration of the root CA certificate (Go duration string, e.g. 43800h).

servingCertificate.description: Settings for the webhook serving certificate.

duration.description: Validity duration of the serving certificate (Go duration string, e.g. 8760h).

tag.description: Container image tag. Defaults to the chart appVersion when empty.

imagePullSecrets.description: Optional list of image pull secrets for private registries.

nameOverride.description: Override the chart name portion of resource names.

fullnameOverride.description: Override the full resource name prefix.

podAnnotations.description: Annotations added to every webhook pod.

service.description: Kubernetes Service settings for the webhook.

resources.description: CPU/memory resource requests and limits for the webhook container.

nodeSelector.description: Node selector labels for pod scheduling.

topologySpreadConstraints.description: Topology spread constraints (useful for multi-zone clusters).

enabled.description: Enable the PodDisruptionBudget. Recommended for production deployments.

minAvailable.description: Minimum number or percentage of pods that must remain available (e.g. 1 or "50%").
